session.user:
Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report ALL results including any failures:
make lint ty
Report the full output.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands as requested.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run lint and type checking with make

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
**Result: Both checks passed**
make lint ty: PASSED
Summary: - ruff check: All checks passed! - ty check: All checks passed!
Both linting and type checking tools completed successfully with no violations or errors found.
